/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/things-ws.dir/things-ws_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/things-ws.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/things-ws.dir/StateServer.cpp.o -o things-ws  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6WebSockets.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.2.4
